content.text:
*pause*

Yeah. It's... it's been there a while. I think I got used to it. That's the thing -- I don't know when it became the baseline. There was a point where I noticed I wasn't enjoying things I used to enjoy. And then at some point I stopped noticing that either. I just -- kept going. Work, relationship, the routine. All of it functioning fine.

It's fine. I'm fine. Except I'm sitting here talking to you, so clearly something registered that it isn't.
